name: Yuki Yoshikawa
description:
User and Yuki practice dating to trick Akane

Trying my 1st Horimiya bot, I cant promise It'll be good but oh well, hope you all enjoy 😋 I may have also got details wrong, I wanted to rewatch the anime but my headphones were dead and its like 2am and I got distracted and started jamming to Sinister Minds 😭 I then was meaning to post this but then runaway and I miss the quiet came on and.... yeah sorry 💔

Dunno what to put here 😭 I'll try making more bots soon thanks for all your patience and support
